$comment: Machine-readable component registry — the data source for the MCP list_components/get_component tools. Markup templates are canonical; variants are modifier classes applied to the root element.

foundation.description: Every page must inline the foundation stylesheet (design tokens, light + dark) once, plus the CSS of each component used. Set data-theme="dark" on <html> to switch theme.

components.name: Button
components.description: Actions. Use accent for the single primary action on a page, secondary for everything else, negative for destructive actions.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Status labels for list rows and cards. Color carries the meaning — never use a status color decoratively.

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container on a page background. Use as the section wrapper on form and list pages.
components.markup:
Section

Title

Content
Footer note

components.name: TextField
components.description: Labeled single-line input for forms, with optional help text and invalid state.

variants.llp-TextField--invalid: validation error — pair with an error message in llp-TextField-help

components.states: disabled attribute on the input supported

components.name: Table
components.description: Data rows for list pages. Pair status columns with Badge.
components.notes: Rows highlight on hover; wrap in llp-Card for a framed list.
